# Agent Rule
- Each chat session must begin by creating a session file named session-{time}.md in .github/sessions.
- The session file should not record the entire conversation. It should only record the final state.
- If any decisions are made during the conversation, update the generated session file to reflect those decisions.
- When a session termination command is received, update the **Project documents** listed below and write a Git commit message based on the session contents, and delete the session file.

# Project documents
